data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"5ad5-be4d","generatedAt":"2026-04-17T21:57:41Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Ticket system performance: archived fast-skip + Python pipeline consolidation","description":"Two-story epic targeting 16K-ticket tracker perf: (S1a/S1b) archived-marker fast-skip with self-heal + cache-key hardening, (S2) Python pipeline consolidation.","successCriteria":["reduce_all_tickets() skips archived dirs via stat() check; marker-absent + ARCHIVED event \u2192 slow-path fallback","Every ARCHIVED event writer invokes marker-write path (after event durable, same commit); failed marker write does not block event commit","ticket revert removes marker atomically with revert commit (flock acquired); rolls back on commit failure","One-shot backfill script creates markers idempotently via net-archival-state reducer computation","to_llm moved to ticket_reducer/llm_format.py; three ticket-*.sh scripts invoke \u22641 python3 process; flock boundary preserved","Before/after timing script under tests/perf/ emits PASS/FAIL against configurable --threshold (default \u226520%)","reduce_all_tickets() validates marker on fast path by checking *-ARCHIVED.json; orphan markers removed and fall back to slow path","compute_dir_hash() extended to include .archived marker presence/absence in hash input"]},"stories":[{"id":"bc06-74f4","title":"S1a \u2014 Archived-marker fast-skip (core)","description":"Primary fast-skip implementation: marker write on every ARCHIVED event writer, revert removal under flock, reducer stat() check, backfill script, timing script","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["reduce_all_tickets() skips archived dirs via stat() before reduce_ticket(); marker-absent + ARCHIVED event \u2192 slow-path","Every ARCHIVED event writer invokes marker write path (grep-audited); marker after event durable in same commit; failed marker write does not prevent event commit","ticket revert removes marker under flock, atomic with commit; rolls back on commit failure","ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh creates markers idempotently via net-archival-state; per-ticket flock","Timing script under tests/perf/ emits PASS/FAIL against configurable --threshold (default \u226520%)"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Marker write ordering + crash-injection test","[Performance] Per-ticket flock; serial backfill acceptable (compact-all pattern)","[Maintainability] Merge order S1 \u2192 S2","[Testing] Env-var gate for crash injection (e.g., DSO_FAULT_INJECT)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":true,"splitRole":"foundation","splitPairId":"96e0-4634","blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SCs 1, 2, 3, 4, 6"},{"id":"96e0-4634","title":"S1b \u2014 Orphan self-heal + cache-key hardening","description":"Drift safety net: orphan-marker validation (reducer removes stale markers and falls back) + compute_dir_hash extension to include marker state","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["reduce_all_tickets() checks for *-ARCHIVED.json when seeing marker; orphan marker removed, slow-path fallback returns correct active state","compute_dir_hash() incorporates .archived marker presence; cache correctly invalidated on marker write or self-heal removal"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Drift safety net from concurrency-lens scrutiny","[Testing] Cache + stat() + self-heal interaction test (not isolated)","[Performance] Extra stat() per dir negligible (OS-cached)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":true,"splitRole":"enhancement","splitPairId":"bc06-74f4","blockedBy":["bc06-74f4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SCs 7, 8"},{"id":"e768-2bae","title":"S2 \u2014 Python pipeline consolidation","description":"Move to_llm into ticket_reducer/llm_format.py; migrate three ticket-*.sh scripts to single-process entries; preserve fcntl.flock boundary","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["to_llm importable from ticket_reducer.llm_format; all callers updated (including test files)","ticket-list.sh/ticket-show.sh/ticket-transition.sh each invoke \u22641 python3 process (subprocess-count test)","fcntl.flock critical section boundary preserved in ticket-transition.sh (boundary test)"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Pre-story grep MUST include .md files (SKILL/doc refs)","[Testing] Structural assertion on shell script text for subprocess count","[Reliability] Flock-boundary test via env-var probe","[Maintainability] Merge order S1 \u2192 S2"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bc06-74f4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 5"},{"id":"d739-6d48","title":"Update project docs","description":"Update ticket-cli-reference.md and ticket-system-v3-architecture.md; CLAUDE.md only if existing refs become stale","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["ticket-cli-reference.md documents ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh","ticket-system-v3-architecture.md describes .archived marker contract + new ticket_reducer/llm_format.py path","CLAUDE.md updated if any existing rule/quickref references stale patterns"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md","[Maintainability] Runs after all implementation stories"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bc06-74f4","96e0-4634","e768-2bae"],"satisfiesCriterion":"implicit (docs sync)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["bc06-74f4","e768-2bae","96e0-4634","d739-6d48"]}}
